goal: Prepare the repository for GitHub publication and reuse.
deliverable: runtime receipts for this publish-readiness pass
constraints: do not add new runtime dependencies
do not assume a final open-source license choice
acceptance_criteria: repository explains current MCP structure and deployment
machine-specific paths are removed from committed MCP config
non_goals: license selection on behalf of the owner
assumptions: source deployment is acceptable for the first public GitHub version
a placeholder UNLICENSED file is safer than selecting a legal license without owner approval
